abstract: Properties shared by all container types.
overview:
## Discussion

A `container` component is a structural component that holds other components and allows for logical grouping to use for layout and styling information. Child components of container are positioned and rendered relative to the parent component. The minimum size of a container component is determined by the size of its child components.

### Example

items.description: Learn the basic Apple News Format container concepts required for the three advanced tutorials.
items.name: About Containers

items.description: Use container components to create the component hierarchies you need for special article designs.
items.name: Nesting Components in an Article

items.description: Add a scene to your article to create special effects.
items.name: Adding a Scene to a Chapter or a Section Header

items.name: Creating an Article Link

items.description: Configure a side-by-side, horizontal arrangement of components for your article.
items.name: Displaying Components Side By Side

items.description: The component for defining the top area of an article, chapter, or section.
items.name: Header

items.description: The component for organizing an article into sections.
items.name: Section

items.description: The component for organizing an article into chapters.
items.name: Chapter

items.description: The component for setting apart content that is not directly related to the article, such as promotional content.
items.name: Aside

items.description: An object used in any container component type to define how the collection of child components is presented.
items.name: CollectionDisplay

items.description: The object for displaying components side by side in a Container component.
items.name: HorizontalStackDisplay

items.description: The component for redistributing empty space inside a horizontal stack collection.
items.name: FlexibleSpacer

items.description: The component for defining a horizontal line to visually divide parts of your article.
items.name: Divider

items.description: The container component for creating a link to an article.
items.name: ArticleLink

items.description: The patterns supported for article identifiers in UUID format.
items.name: SupportedArticleIdentifier
